# Toolkit

> Ocsigen Toolkit provides various user interface widgets and related utilities that assist in the rapid development of interactive Web applications.

## Manual
- [Introduction](intro.md)
- [Ocsigen Toolkit](index.md)
- [Library `ocsigen-toolkit.client`](ocsigen-toolkit.client/index.md)
- [Library `ocsigen-toolkit.server`](ocsigen-toolkit.server/index.md)
